svg.title: Quantum-Inspired Key Security Architecture (Post-KMS)
svg.desc: Four parallel quantum entropy sources feed into a decentralized key derivation system without cloud dependencies. Hyperbolic tessellation + QRNG ensemble provide cryptographic material. No external KMS required — all security is local or peer-sourced.
svg.text: Entropy fusion is deterministic but cryptographically irreversible.
Client-side key derivation; wallet seeds never leave device.
